text: Implement a dynamic Importance scoring system that updates based on the most recent and critical tasks. This ensures that the agent focuses on preserving the most valuable and time-sensitive information, preventing the accumulation of noise and maintaining the efficiency gains from Chrome 146 Gemini Nano.
reason: This improves the plan by addressing the recent winError by creating a more adaptive and context-aware importance scoring mechanism, which better aligns the agent's priorities with current task demands and reduces the overhead of constantly re-evaluating the importance of older, less relevant data.
